notableEvents.label: Willson Contreras GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Willson Contreras grounds into a double play, third baseman Alec Bohm to first baseman Bryce Harper. Mickey Gasper out at 3rd. Willson Contreras out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Willson Contreras rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Willson Contreras grounds into a double play, third baseman Alec Bohm to first baseman Bryce Harper. Mickey Gasper out at 3rd. Willson Contreras out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Ceddanne Rafaela pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Ceddanne Rafaela homers (4) on a fly ball to left center field. Wilyer Abreu scores.

notableEvents.label: Willson Contreras GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Willson Contreras grounds into a double play, shortstop Edmundo Sosa to second baseman Bryson Stott to first baseman Bryce Harper. Wilyer Abreu out at 2nd. Willson Contreras out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Kyle Schwarber steals (1) 3rd base. Trea Turner steals (5) 2nd base.
